## Description

<!-- Brief description of the changes -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Schemas validate against JSON Schema meta-schema (`npm run validate:schemas`)
- [ ] All example documents validate (`npm run validate:examples`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if schema or spec changes)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or MAJOR version bump proposed)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Schema change (new field, new enum value, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tooling change (validator, CI, etc.)
- [ ] Example update
- [ ] Bug fix
